user_goal: B061 A 股数据源 P1：数据地基 + A 股 lookup。来源：B060 P0 spike 判定 GO(生产 VM 可达 sina/tushare、akshare+baostock 装 OK、600519.SH 519ms 取数成功)→用户同意立项 P1。**目标**：系统能取 A 股真实 EOD，并在 B059 /symbols 查 A 股代码(600519.SH→茅台 价格图)。多市场数据地基(B055-P3/A 股策略依赖)。**范围(P1 严格数据/lookup 层)**：符号/市场维度+CN 价格 provider(插 B059 抽象)+CN 交易日历+B059 详情页支持 A 股代码。**不做(仍 US-only,延后)**：账户/NAV/组合/执行/票据/策略/回测/交易规则(T+1/涨跌停/手数/ST)/跨市场 FX；币种 P1 仅元数据/展示(¥ vs $)不入组合聚合。**设计精髓(§9)**：market 限定 canonical 字符串+派生 SymbolRef+裸=US 默认→加一层非动全身(US 零迁移/CN 同表共存/市场维度锁数据 lookup 层)。**§8 深度先验(B060 GO 诚实限定)**：GO 仅验地理/工具/一次取数(600519 10 行样本)；P1 第一要务=验实全历史深度≥3-5y/全 5 符号/akshare-baostock 交叉源<0.5%/~300 规模日更(F002 构建即暴露+F005 真机坐实)。复用 B059 SymbolDataProvider 抽象+symbol_price_cache(+market/currency 列)+/symbols 详情页+B060 SymbolLink+cost_guard。5 features 4g+1c：F001 符号/市场维度地基(SymbolRef+canonical+normalize+消歧 BRK.B+board 推断)；F002 CN provider(akshare 主+baostock 对照/fallback 插抽象+按市场路由+缓存/限流+币种+§8 深度,最重)；F003 CN 交易日历+gap 按市场；F004 B059 详情页支持 A 股代码(CNY/源诚实标注)；F005 codex A 股 lookup+§8 深度验证+US 不破+边界+signoff。硬边界：research-only/**no-broker(只 akshare/baostock 不接 futu/tiger 禁列)**/no-AI/§12.10.2(akshare loader 不 import trade→请求路径，AST 守门)/no-execution(SymbolLink)/EOD+CNY 诚实/新路由配套 next.config(§20)/**mypy CI-exact `workbench_api tests`(§19)**。spec docs/specs/B061-ashare-data-p1-spec.md(6 章)；路径文档 docs/product/a-share-data-source-integration-path-2026-06.md(§8 指标/§9 schema)。

evaluator_feedback.summary: 🟡 F005 L1 FULL PASS + L2 网络阻塞。L1 pytest 1294/mypy 0/ruff 0/frontend vitest 331/tsc/eslint 全绿✓；F001 SymbolRef 消歧正确✓；F002 CnProvider 市场路由✓；F003 trading_calendar CN-safe 待 planner 批✓；F004 /symbols CNY 货币感知✓；代码层 L2 逻辑验证 PASS✓（市场路由/缓存隔离/边界守门/向后兼容）。🟡 真机验证延后：SSH trade-prod 不可达(network/auth 待诊断)→无法验证 akshare/baostock 部署+A 股 lookup 端点+§8 深度实测。交付：代码完整+L1 全绿+签收报告(待 L2 真机)。
issues: L2 真机验证阻塞：SSH 连接失败（trade-prod 不可达）

generator_handoff.summary: B061 F001-F004 (all executor:generator) complete; all CI green (Python/Backend/Frontend). building -> verifying. Handing off F005 (executor:codex).
generator_handoff.F001_symbology: workbench_api/symbols/symbol_ref.py SymbolRef value object (parse canonical -> code/market/exchange/currency/board; US bare=default, CN=6digit+.SH/.SZ; BRK.B/^GSPC disambiguation -> US; board by code prefix). normalize_symbol delegates to it (US bare byte-identical -> zero migration). Tests test_symbol_ref.py.
generator_handoff.F002_cn_provider: workbench_api/symbols/cn_provider.py CnSymbolProvider (akshare primary stock_zh_a_hist qfq + baostock fallback adjustflag=2; lazy import + DI; canonical<->native 600519.SH->akshare 600519/baostock sh.600519; never-raise -> SymbolNotFoundError; last_source honest). service _resolve_provider routes by SymbolRef.market (CN->CnSymbolProvider, US->yfinance); source now provider-derived (honest); SymbolPriceDetail +currency. symbol_price_cache +market/currency cols (migration 0025 server_default US/USD). akshare>=1.12 + baostock>=0.8.8 in backend pyproject + mypy override. Tests test_cn_provider.py.
generator_handoff.F003_cn_calendar_ADJUDICATION: trade/data/trading_calendar.py (market_for_symbol/snapshot_market + trading_calendar_gaps moved from loader). **ADJUDICATION needs planner ratification (same pattern as B059 F003 SEC deviation)**: spec §9.6 assumed a daily gap check that false-positives on CN holidays, but the actual check is MONTH-COARSE (flags >1 month between trading dates) -> inherently CN-safe (CN longest closure ~1wk << 1mo). So NO daily CN holiday calendar was wired into the offline trade engine (would over-couple it to akshare network for zero P1 gain — trade/ ingests no CN data in P1) and NO decorative market param was added (avoids §17 plumbed-but-ignored). Delivered: named calendar module + market utils + CN-safety regression test (Spring-Festival week NOT flagged, real >1mo hole IS). Daily per-market calendar deferred to P2 (workbench layer, where akshare lives).
generator_handoff.F004_cn_lookup_ui: frontend /symbols page: currency-aware money formatting (¥ for CNY / $ for USD via narrowSymbol) on close + 52w high/low + explicit currency badge (CNY/USD, language-neutral); honest source badge already shows akshare. CN fundamentals degrade to non_us (US-gated, unchanged). Tests symbols.spec.tsx (+CN render test). No backend change -> api.ts unchanged.
generator_handoff.F005_for_codex: (1) L1 all gates (backend pytest/ruff/mypy CI-exact `workbench_api tests`; root pytest/ruff/`mypy trade`; frontend vitest/tsc/lint/i18n parity/api.ts drift). (2) L2 real VM: a) A-share lookup /symbols 600519.SH -> 茅台 price chart with ¥/CNY badge + akshare source + other reps; b) ★§8 DEPTH (the core P1 verification): full history >=3-5y (NOT 10-row sample) / all 5 reps (600519.SH/000001.SZ/300750.SZ/688981.SH/000300) / akshare-baostock same-day close cross-source <0.5% / ~300-universe daily-update feasibility + connectivity success rate; c) US regression UNBROKEN (SPY/NVDA still via yfinance, $/USD); d) boundaries: no-broker SDK (only akshare/baostock), no-execution (SymbolLink), no-AI, EOD/CNY honest labelling; e) recent-errors=0 + HEAD==main; f) drill self-clean. Signoff docs/test-reports/B061-ashare-data-p1-signoff-*.md (§A-share lookup evidence + §§8 depth metrics actual + §US unbroken + §boundaries + §F003 adjudication ratification + §Ops).
generator_handoff.OPS_CRITICAL: akshare/baostock are now backend runtime deps — the VM deploy MUST install them (pip from pyproject). If the deploy uses a cached venv that skips dep install, CN lookups will degrade to 404 (CnSymbolProvider lazy-import fails gracefully -> SymbolNotFoundError, never 500). Verify akshare imports on the VM as part of L2. §8 depth can ONLY be verified on the VM (reachability + real data are VM concerns; local tests mock akshare).

session_notes.evaluator: 2026-06-14 **F005 L1 FULL PASS→L2 网络阻塞待续**。**L1 全门禁绿**：backend pytest 1294/mypy CI-exact(symbols 模块 0 errors、trade 0 errors)/ruff 0/root pytest 843/mypy trade 0✓；frontend vitest 331/tsc/eslint/i18n parity 6✓；alembic head 0025✓。**代码层 L2 验证**：F001 SymbolRef 消歧正确(600519.SH→CN/CNY, SPY→US/USD)✓；F002 CnProvider 市场路由(service._resolve_provider 按 market)✓；symbol_price_cache 隔离(+market/currency 列,price_snapshot 不动)✓；F003 trading_calendar CN-safe(月粒度 gap 天然 CN-safe,trade 不耦合 akshare)✓【待 planner 裁定】；F004 /symbols CNY 货币感知✓；边界守门(§12.10.2/no-execution/next.config/deploy.sh)✓；向后兼容(US 裸零迁移)✓。**🟡 真机端点验证延后**：SSH trade-prod 不可达(connection closed,auth 或 network 待诊断)→无法验证 (1)生产 VM akshare/baostock 是否装(缺则 CN lookup 优雅降级 404) (2)A 股 600519.SH lookup 端点可用 (3)§8 深度指标(全历史≥3-5y/5 符号/交叉源<0.5%/~300 规模)；预期正常工作,但缺真机正面证据。交付：代码完整(L1 全绿)+签收报告 docs/test-reports/B061-...-2026-06-14.md(说明 L1 PASS+L2 延后原因)。**下次 Evaluator / Planner**：(a) planner 批 F003 架构裁定(月粒度 gap→trade 不耦合 akshare 决策)(b) 网络恢复后→L2 真机 A 股 lookup + §8 深度验证 + supplement signoff→done。
